## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Glossary strategy: Enhance depth, visuals, and authority; incorporate first-party data and lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Editorial process: Refine content guidelines, prioritize email security topics, and improve CMS workflow](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Competitor analysis: Expand competitor list to include more relevant players in email security space](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Topics

### Glossary Enhancement Strategy

  - [Aim to match/exceed Proofpoint's depth, visuals, and authority](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Add more images, videos, FAQs, and first-party data](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Incorporate lead magnets and improve internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Utilize Abnormal Intelligence for phishing examples and recent attack trends report](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### Editorial Process Refinement

  - [Content guidelines: Use newer external sources (2023+), prefer internal studies, capitalize terms in lists](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [CTA template: Emily to share examples for consistent call-to-actions](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [CMS access: Plan to grant Sydney access for direct uploads in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

### Content Prioritization

  - [Focus on email security cluster (39 of 97 ready articles)](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Specific articles prioritized: lines 829, 830, 842, 845, 849](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Table security awareness topics until after product launch (post-RSA)](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

### Competitor Analysis Expansion

  - [Current list: Proofpoint, CrowdStrike, Darktrace, Mimecast](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Add Avanan and other relevant competitors, especially those competing in smaller deals](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Sydney to research and propose additional competitors next week](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Option to refresh either glossary pages or blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [For attack analysis posts (e.g., Disney+ attack), find newer examples rather than updating old ones](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Sydney to analyze which type (glossary vs blog) will have the most impact for initial refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason/Sydney to develop new glossary structure and provide examples next week](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Emily to share content style guide and CTA examples](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Jade to work on getting Sydney CMS access in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Sydney to deliver 5 content pieces (mix of glossary and blog refreshes) by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
  - [Abdallah to review and expand competitor list, focusing on email security space](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Team to continue refining content strategy based on performance metrics and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/XLfgrvNQ78XoP9r14pJbhwUd2C5KHSD6?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
